brand-story-img.query: Jewelry That Becomes Part of Your Story Velmora was founded on the belief that fine jewelry should be worn and loved every day — not reserved for special occasions. Each piece is designed in Paris and crafted from 18K gold-plated brass, meant to evolve with you.
